name: schedule
description: Create and manage scheduled tasks. Schedules persist across restarts and can trigger agent prompts at specific times or intervals.
commands: create <cron-expression> <message...>     — Create a new scheduled task
list                                      — List all schedules for this agent
disable <schedule-id>                     — Disable a schedule without deleting it
test <cron-expression>                    — Show next 5 run times for a cron expression

maxSchedulesPerAgent.description: Maximum number of schedules per agent

storagePath.description: Path to store schedule data (defaults to ~/.beige/schedules.json)
